title: PG&E Corp. (PCG) Misses Q3 Earnings, Reaffirms 2023 View
text: PG&E Corp.'s (PCG) third-quarter adjusted EPS lags the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 14.3%.

title: PG&E Corporation Reports Third-Quarter Results; On Track to Deliver Solid 2023
text: Recorded GAAP earnings were $0.16 per diluted share for the third quarter of 2023, compared to earnings of $0.21 per diluted share for the same period in 2022. Non-GAAP core earnings were $0.24 per diluted share for the third quarter of 2023, compared to earnings of $0.29 per diluted share for the same period in 2022.
